Home�Services�Breach Counsel� Expert Witness
Litigation Support

Cybersecurity
Expert Witness

Effective expert witness testimony requires the rare combination of deep technical expertise and the ability to communicate complex cybersecurity concepts clearly to judges, juries, and arbitration panels. Our practice provides credible, well-prepared expert testimony for breach litigation, regulatory proceedings, and commercial disputes.

Credible Technical Testimony

Cybersecurity litigation increasingly turns on technical questions that require expert analysis and testimony. Was the defendant's security posture reasonable given industry standards? Did the plaintiff's security failures contribute to the breach? What is the standard of care for organizations of this type and size? These questions require an expert who can analyze the technical evidence and present findings with clarity and credibility.

Our expert witness practice provides both consulting and testifying expert services. As consulting experts, we advise counsel on technical strategy, evaluate opposing expert opinions, and identify strengths and weaknesses in the technical evidence. As testifying experts, we deliver clear, credible testimony that helps triers of fact understand complex cybersecurity concepts.

Capabilities

  • Testifying expert witness services � deposition and trial
  • Consulting expert advisory for litigation strategy
  • Forensic evidence analysis and independent verification
  • Standard of care analysis against industry benchmarks and frameworks
  • Opposing expert report review and rebuttal preparation
  • Damages analysis and data exposure quantification
  • Regulatory compliance assessment for litigation support
  • Report preparation for court admission under Daubert standards
  • Arbitration and mediation testimony

Who We Serve

Breach counsel attorneys preparing for trial or settlement negotiations. Defense attorneys responding to regulatory enforcement actions. Plaintiff attorneys pursuing claims for cybersecurity negligence. Insurance coverage counsel evaluating policy obligations in cyber claims.

Expert Services

  • Testifying Expert
  • Consulting Expert
  • Report Preparation
  • Deposition Testimony
  • Trial Testimony
  • Opposing Expert Review

Credentials

  • Fortune 50 IR Experience
  • Defense Industry Background
  • 26K+ Industry Following
  • Published Analyst
